title: Notes
description: This mod adds notes. You can put text and images in it
body:
Note is an item that can store text and images. Notes can be used like book with only one page but you can also add images to it. For that you need only image url. Upload your image to any image shairing website and paste a link to it in game. Every note can be finalized. After that nobody would be able to change text or images in it.

## Features
### Note
![note](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/418bc99501700f3567f5b405b53ce21414f52cee.png)

### Moving and scaling images
![move](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d12e964c8a4c8598f47de301758aaca9f002e04.gif)
![scale](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3651043eee7024a5d45578bf35281e8b15f70745.gif)

### Notebooks (version 0.4.1 and higher)
Now you can also create notebooks which contains mulptimple notes (up to 100). To craft notebook you need 3 leather craft is shapeless. To add note to notebook you need to place finalized note in second hand and notebook in main hand and then press right mouse button. You can also finalize it and nobody would be able to take out notes.

![notebook](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8c2efed811a66453303441fe3da5cea759627fb.png)

### Gifs support (version 0.4.1 and higher)
![gif example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0b1069e92f33e13c79314e3f1b8966e0ac5666f.gif)

### Recipe
![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7aee2745499e349a8238caf4b202b506164e7018.png)

### Note cloning
Like written books finalized notes can be cloned.

![cloning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8ef22feda0b41dd07c3345a918bd2a83e0085fa.png)

#
If you find a bug, your game crashed or you want to suggest a new feature create an issue on mod's [issue tracker](https://github.com/K1miram/notes/issues).
